bosses.note: Each boss has a troop type that deals 50% more damage. ALWAYS match your troop type to the boss schedule for maximum damage and ranking rewards.

Frenzied_Butcher.tip: Tank players have a natural advantage on Mon/Thu. Always attack Butcher on these days.

Frankenstein.tip: Missile squad excels here. If you're a Tank player, you still get rewards but deal less damage.

Mutant_Bulldog.tip: Aircraft squad dominates Wed/Sat. Tank players should still attack for participation rewards.

general_rules: Spawns at server time 0:00, 6:00, 12:00, 18:00 - active for 3 hours each spawn
Rankings based on highest single-attack damage per day
Always attack AFTER Hero Advancement phase of Arms Race for maximum power
Use War Fever before attacking for +1% power boost
Rally with alliance members for higher damage
Goals rewards are one-time only and based on highest single-hit damage

Sunday.note: No Wanted Monster active on Sunday. Use for preparation and resource gathering.

Monday.strategy: Primary damage day for Tank players. Max all 5 attacks.

Tuesday.strategy: Primary damage day for Missile players. Tank players get base rewards only.

Wednesday.strategy: Primary damage day for Aircraft players. Tank players get base rewards only.
